test_cases.input: I need you to design an automated data pipeline that collects business data from Zoho Invoice and Pipedrive, cleans and integrates it through a workflow, and finally stores it in Google BigQuery for c

arguments.description: Design and execute an automated pipeline to clean, integrate Zoho Invoice and Pipedrive data, and store in BigQuery for financial and sales analysis. Run existing SQL queries and verify results.

tools_called.name: system_architecture_designer

args.system_design: Design an automated cloud data pipeline for a business that collects financial data from Zoho Invoice and sales/CRM data from Pipedrive, cleans and standardizes both sources, integrates them through a workflow, and stores curated data in Google BigQuery for centralized financial and sales analysis. The existing BigQuery business_data_summary indicates monthly metrics with fields month, total_revenue, total_expenses, and net_profit for 2024-01 through 2024-03, so the architecture should support monthly financial rollups as well as drill-down analysis. Include source ingestion layers for Zoho Invoice entities such as invoices, customers, payments, credit notes, expenses if available, and Pipedrive entities such as organizations, persons, leads, deals, activities, pipelines, and stages. Include a raw landing layer, transformation/cleaning layer, conformed business layer, and analytics marts in BigQuery. Include entity matching between customers/accounts across Zoho Invoice and Pipedrive using deterministic keys first and fuzzy matching fallback. Include incremental loads, idempotent processing, schema evolution handling, data quality checks, lineage, retry logic, dead-letter handling, and alerting. Include orchestration workflow steps from extract to load to transform to publish. Include recommended BigQuery dataset structure, partitioning/clustering, and example fact/dimension model for finance and sales analytics. Include governance, IAM, secrets handling, and auditability.
args.technology_stack: Use Google Cloud as the primary platform. Recommend managed connectors or API-based extraction from Zoho Invoice and Pipedrive, orchestrated with Cloud Composer or an equivalent workflow orchestrator. Use Cloud Run or Python-based extraction services for API pulls, Cloud Storage for raw staging if needed, BigQuery for warehouse storage and transformation, and dbt or SQL-based ELT for modeling. Use Great Expectations or SQL assertions for data quality checks, Cloud Logging/Monitoring for observability, Secret Manager for credentials, IAM service accounts for least-privilege access, and optionally Pub/Sub for event-driven triggers. Prefer batch incremental ingestion on a scheduled cadence, with support for near-real-time extension later.
args.hardware_requirements: Managed cloud-first deployment with minimal dedicated hardware. Recommend GCP project resources sized for moderate SMB to mid-market analytics workloads: BigQuery serverless warehouse, Cloud Run services with autoscaling, Cloud Composer environment sized small to medium, Cloud Storage standard class for raw archives, and monitoring/logging enabled. No GPU required. Estimate baseline operational footprint as 2-4 vCPU equivalent for extraction services during runs, 8-16 GB RAM for orchestration/execution environments, and scalable storage based on retained raw and curated history.
args.interaction_interface: Primary interface is an internal data platform and analytics workflow rather than an end-user application. Include interfaces for operators and analysts: orchestration dashboard for pipeline runs, logs and alerts for failures, SQL access in BigQuery, BI tool connectivity such as Looker Studio or Tableau, and documentation/catalog for datasets and lineage. Describe how finance and sales analysts consume curated marts and monthly KPI tables, including a business_data_summary-style output table for executive reporting.
args.test_optimization_plan: Provide a testing and optimization plan covering unit tests for extractors, contract/schema tests for source payloads, transformation tests for metric correctness, reconciliation tests between Zoho Invoice totals and BigQuery finance facts, and sales funnel consistency checks for Pipedrive. Include performance optimization through incremental MERGE patterns, partition pruning, clustering, materialized summary tables, and cost controls. Include operational monitoring with SLA/SLO targets, anomaly detection on row counts and KPI shifts, retry/backoff for API rate limits, and periodic review of entity matching precision/recall.
